phrases.intent_en: Order the famous African hot chocolate
phrases.text_local: Un chocolat chaud L'Africain, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: uhn shoh-koh-LAH SHOH laf-ree-KEHN, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Angelina's 'L'Africain' hot chocolate is made from a blend of three African cocoas — Niger, Ghana, and Côte d'Ivoire. It's served so thick it can barely pour. A separate pot of whipped cream comes alongside. It has been on the menu since Angelina opened in 1903.

phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un Mont-Blanc, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH uhn mohn-BLAHN, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Angelina's Mont-Blanc is their signature pastry — a meringue base topped with whipped cream and thin chestnut-cream vermicelli strings, resembling the snow-covered mountain it's named after. It has been made to the same recipe since the tearoom opened.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a wait for a table inside
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une liste d'attente pour une table à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon LEEST dah-TAHNT poor oon TAH-bluh ah lan-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Angelina on Rue de Rivoli has a beautiful Belle Époque dining room with high ceilings and painted murals. There is often a queue — you can also buy pastries and hot chocolate to take away from the counter without waiting. The shop is at 226 Rue de Rivoli, near the Tuileries garden.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a box of pastries to take away
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais une boîte de gâteaux à emporter, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH oon BWAHT duh gah-TOH ah ahm-por-TAY, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Angelina's pastry counter sells individual cakes and gift boxes to take away — a popular choice for picnics in the adjacent Tuileries garden. The millefeuille, éclair, and religieuse are excellent alongside the famous Mont-Blanc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the history of the tearoom
phrases.text_local: Depuis quand cette salon de thé existe-t-il ?
phrases.pronunciation: duh-PWEE kahn set sah-LOHN duh TAY eg-ZEEST-teel
phrases.cultural_note: Angelina was founded in 1903 by confectioner Antoine Rumpelmayer, who named it after his daughter-in-law. It quickly became a fashionable meeting place — regulars included Coco Chanel, Marcel Proust, and Empress Eugénie. The Rivoli location remains the original flagship.
